title: App crashes on login
body: Logged in this morning and the whole app crashed. Happens sometimes. Please fix.

title: NullPointerException in BillingService.calculateTariff when meterReadings is empty
body: Stack trace attached. Reproduces 100% when a customer has a registered meter but zero submitted readings. Customers on the new variable tariff see a 500 on the dashboard. Started after deploy 4.12.0.

title: Add dark mode to the customer portal
body: Lots of users have asked for a dark theme on the account dashboard. Would be nice to have it follow the system setting.

title: How do I rotate the API key for the white-label integration?
body: We're integrating the billing API and need to rotate credentials quarterly. Couldn't find this in the docs. Is there an endpoint or is it manual?

title: CI pipeline flaky on the e2e step
body: The end-to-end job fails roughly 1 in 4 runs with a timeout, then passes on retry. Slowing down every merge. Probably a race condition in the test setup, not the product.

title: Payment data exposed in debug logs
body: Noticed that the last 4 digits of card numbers and full billing addresses are being written to the application logs at INFO level in the payments service. These logs are shipped to a third-party aggregator. This is customer financial data.

title: Docs for the Flex tariff webhook are out of date
body: The payload example in the Flex integration guide still shows the v1 field names. The actual webhook sends v2 (camelCase, extra `gridEventId`). Cost us an afternoon.
